name: Apple Pudding Cake w/ Self-Making Sauce
recipeIngredient: 5 tablespoons Fructose or honey (or equivalent sugar substitute)
1 cup Self-rising all-purpose flour (or cake flour or pancake mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the apple slices neatly in rows of concentric circles in a square or round 9-inch nonstick cake pan which has been sprayed with cooking spray.
2. Sprinkle lightly with lemon juice, sweetener, and spices (cinnamon and any optional allspice).
3. In a large bowl, combine the flour, egg, brown sugar, and cold water; beat until smooth.
4. Spoon the batter over the apples.
5. Sprinkle the top of the batter lightly with additional spices.
6. Pour the boiling water in a thin stream over the batter.
7. Bake uncovered in a preheated 375°F oven for 30 minutes.
8. To serve: Cut into squares or wedges; invert each serving on a dessert plate. Spoon some of the apple pudding sauce that forms in the bottom of the pan on top. Refrigerate leftover cake and serve chilled; the sauce will form a pudding-like glaze.
{110 calories per serving; 120 with honey; 85 with sugar substitute}
